text: Here's what science actually says about prebiotics. Prebiotics are types of fiber that feed your good gut bacteria. Without them, your microbiome can struggle, leading to digestive issues. Studies show prebiotics can improve gut health and boost immunity. But here's the twist: not all prebiotics are created equal! Some early research suggests that the wrong types can actually cause bloating. Want to unlock the secrets of gut health? Follow for more insights!
